query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO documentation_pages (title, slug, category, content, sort_order, is_published, created_at) VALUES
('QUMUS Ecosystem Overview', 'qumus-overview', 'architecture', 'The QUMUS (Quantum Unified Management & Utility System) is the autonomous brain of the Canryn Production ecosystem. It controls all subsidiary systems with 90% autonomous decision-making and 10% human oversight. QUMUS operates through 13 autonomous policies organized into two tiers: Core Policies (8) and Ecosystem Policies (5).', 1, true, NOW()),
('RRB Radio Broadcasting Guide', 'rrb-broadcasting-guide', 'broadcasting', 'Rockin Rockin Boogie Radio operates 50 channels across 13 categories. Each channel has equal capabilities — any operator can air content of their choice on their respective channel. Default frequency: 432Hz. Registered through Payten Music in BMI.', 2, true, NOW()),
('Sweet Miracles Foundation Guide', 'sweet-miracles-guide', 'nonprofit', 'Sweet Miracles is the nonprofit foundation of the Canryn Production ecosystem, operating under 501(c) and Section 508 compliance. Mission: Sweetening lives through miracles of community, education, and empowerment. Programs include Education Grants, Community Events, Legacy Preservation, and Emergency Relief.', 3, true, NOW()),
('HybridCast Emergency Broadcast Manual', 'hybridcast-manual', 'emergency', 'HybridCast is the emergency broadcast PWA of the Canryn Production ecosystem. It provides offline-first communication, mesh networking, and autonomous alert escalation. Key features include LoRa/Meshtastic mesh networking, QUMUS Emergency Response policy integration, MGRS mapping, and multi-operator collaboration.', 4, true, NOW()),
('Canryn Production Entity Structure', 'canryn-entity-structure', 'legal', 'Canryn Production is the parent entity of the entire ecosystem. Subsidiaries include QUMUS (autonomous orchestration engine), RRB (broadcasting network), HybridCast (emergency broadcast system), Sweet Miracles (501c nonprofit), and Operator Channels. Autonomy: 90% QUMUS autonomous / 10% human interaction.', 5, true, NOW()),
('AI Assistants: Valanna, Candy & Seraph', 'ai-assistants-guide', 'technology', 'The ecosystem features three AI assistants: Valanna (QUMUS AI Brain, operational voice), Candy (Guardian AI, named for Seabrun "Candy" Hunter Sr.), and Seraph (System Intelligence, deep analysis). All AI assistants are activated and engaged across all systems.', 6, true, NOW()),
('Team Update Delivery System Guide', 'team-updates-guide', 'operations', 'The RRB Team Update Delivery System provides seamless update notifications to all team members. Channels include push notifications (VAPID), email digests, webhook dispatch (Slack/Discord), and in-app changelog. Team members acknowledge updates with one click. QUMUS auto-publishes critical updates.', 7, true, NOW());
